restaurant_name: Nan Xiang Soup Dumplings - East Village
address: 15 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Corporate homepage lists all 9+ Nan Xiang locations (confirmed East Village at 15 St. Marks Place, Tel: 212.970.8788, distinct from Flushing at 39-16 Prince Street and Koreatown at 24 W 33rd St) but provides no itemized, location-specific menu content on this page.

Page returned an effectively empty JS shell on fetch; no menu text rendered and no location selector content retrievable via non-browser fetch. Not escalated to browser rendering because a usable ordering-tier source (order.online/DoorDash storefront) was already found with explicit location verification.
Grubhub page requires JavaScript; fetch returned only a 'No JavaScript' notice with no menu content.

Non-browser fetch returned category names and a 'Featured Items' price list (partial SSR), but did not expose full per-category item descriptions. Superseded by the mirrored order.online storefront (same store ID 29697125), which was rendered via browser and yielded complete category-by-category item descriptions.

DoorDash-powered white-label storefront for the same store ID as the DoorDash listing above; required browser rendering (lazy-loaded sections) to extract full menu text. No cross-contact/allergen facility disclosure present.
Not needed / not pursued further — fetch returned empty content and a usable ordering-tier source was already secured; kept as last-resort fallback only per source tier order.

identity_verification_notes: Storefront page header/address block reads '15 Saint Marks Pl, New York NY 10003-7842, United States', an exact match to the target address. The chain's official corporate site (nanxiangxiaolongbao.com) separately lists 'Manhattan at East Village Tel: 212.970.8788, 15 St. Marks Place, New York, NY 10003' as a distinct location from Flushing (39-16 Prince Street, Tel: 718.321.3838) and Koreatown (24 W 33rd Street, Tel: 212.970.3888), confirming no cross-location mixup occurred.
